children.text: the National Environmental Policy Act of 1969 ( et seq.);42 U.S.C. 4321
the Endangered Species Act of 1973 ( et seq.); and16 U.S.C. 1531

children.heading: Sense of Congress
children.label: b Sense of Congress
children.text: It is the sense of Congress that any Federal permitting and review processes required with respect to a conveyance of an eligible facility under this chapter should be completed with the maximum efficiency and effectiveness.
